title: zornia laevis
intro: Zornia laevis, also known as smooth zornia, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zornia laevis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
